description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, elongated objects are visible near the center of the frame in the bottom right quadrant. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B13
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, elongated objects are visible near the center of the frame in the bottom right quadrant.
bust_reasoning: The document presents a single, grainy, black-and-white optical sensor image with no described kinematics, no corroborating sensor data, and no additional witnesses. The object is vaguely described as 'small, dark, unidentified,' offering no specific features that resist a mundane explanation. This aligns directly with the 85-100 score anchor for single, low-quality images lacking corroboration or kinematic data.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B13 - Page 1

[Redacted]

[Redacted] | [Redacted]
--- | ---
[Redacted] | [Redacted]
[Redacted] | [Redacted]

[Image: A grainy, black-and-white sensor feed showing a central crosshair and a small, dark, unidentified object near the center.]

12/31/99 18:19:54
cover_up_reasoning: The document is a single page where all contextual information surrounding the image, including what appears to be metadata fields and descriptive text, is heavily redacted. This level of redaction, effectively obscuring the entire narrative context of the photo and its origin, goes beyond routine name redactions and indicates substantial concealment of details.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常现象解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份关于未识别异常现象（UAP）的报告，该报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过了编辑处理。未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。图像中的日期因系统日期/时间未设置而有误。该单色图像呈现颗粒感纹理，并带有简化的中心十字线。画面中心右下象限可见两个小型、深色、细长物体。
reported_object_description_zh: 两个小型、深色、细长物体
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件呈现单一、颗粒状、黑白光学传感器图像，无描述的运动学数据，无佐证传感器数据，亦无其他目击者。该物体被模糊描述为“小型、深色、未识别”，未提供任何难以用普通解释来反驳的特定特征。这直接符合针对缺乏佐证或运动学数据的单一低质量图像的85-100分评级标准。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件为单页，其中图像周围的所有上下文信息，包括看似元数据字段和描述性文本，均被大量涂黑处理。这种程度的涂黑处理，有效地模糊了照片及其来源的整个叙事背景，超出了常规姓名涂黑的范畴，表明存在大量细节隐瞒。
claims: FBI submitted UAP report to AARO with a still image from a U.S. military system
Image shows two small, dark, elongated objects
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了包含美国军事系统静止图像的UAP报告
原始图像经过涂黑处理
图像显示两个小型、深色、细长物体
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: The image is described as a "grainy, black-and-white sensor feed," which is highly susceptible to optical artifacts that can create ambiguous shapes.
Bird, bat, or insect at close range: A small, dark, elongated object could easily be an out-of-focus animal close to the sensor, especially given the low quality and lack of scale.
Distant aircraft: A small, dark object in a grainy sensor feed could represent a conventional aircraft at a distance, with its features obscured by resolution and atmospheric conditions.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头光晕或相机伪影：该图像被描述为“颗粒状、黑白传感器画面”，极易受到光学伪影影响，从而产生模糊形状。
近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫：考虑到图像质量低且缺乏比例尺，一个小型、深色、细长的物体很容易是传感器附近失焦的动物。
远距离飞机：颗粒状传感器画面中的小型、深色物体可能代表远距离的常规飞机，其特征因分辨率和大气条件而模糊不清。
cover_up_indicators: Substantial redaction of all contextual metadata surrounding the image
Key identifying information (e.g., source, location details) withheld
cover_up_indicators_zh: 图像周围所有上下文元数据的大量涂黑处理
关键识别信息（例如，来源、位置详情）被隐瞒
